data.title: Retro 2026-04-16: Code quality — reduce function/file complexity
data.description: Retro assessment found 57 Python functions >50 lines (3 over 300), 7 files >1000 lines, 1487 deeply-nested shell lines. Code Quality scores: file_size=2/5, complexity=2/5. Target: all functions <180 lines, files <1000 lines, nesting <6 levels.
